name: PORTAL VEIN ANEURYSM / VARIX
definition: rare localized saccular / fusiform portal venous dilatation with a portal vein diameter of > 20

demographics.Frequency: 3% of all venous aneurysms; most common type of visceral venous aneurysm

clinical.Cx: portal hypertension, spontaneous thrombosis (28%), venous varix rupture,
